---Let's try a new collection. Here's some random words I just thought of:

*   Splootch
*   Grunch
*   Zizzle
*   Stinkmuffin
*   Frustrangle

Frustrangle

When you're so frustrated from everything coming at you from all angles that you want to strangle and/or be strangled.

Frustrated + angle + strangle

Can be used as an adjective, ex. "I'm so fucking frustrangled right now." A verb, "I could frustrangle this mutha fucka." Or noun, "this frustrangle is reeking havoc on my mental state."

I'm going to “fetch" this ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
